description: Matter bridge connectivity test. 2 lamps, 3 options: (1) yandex wifi, no hub needed; (2) aqara zigbee + cloud bridge, needs aqara basic hub only on source side; (3) aqara matter + matter bridge, needs BOTH aqara matter hub (source leg, direct_compat matter) AND yandex matter hub (final leg, target of matter bridge). Expected 3-point Pareto front: (E=1 H=0 Q=0.80), (E=2 H=1 Q=0.84), (E=2 H=2 Q=0.917). Verifies that matter bridge requires hub on both ends and that basic hubs without matter support cannot serve the matter leg.
